So I am quite new to the game, been playing about a week. I think i am going to pull for 24 on the next banner, but have no idea what teams are good for her or if that is someone not great to go after if I am new? I dont have many people right now either
Pure chaos one is hameln ryker + (karen / ramona), it plays a lot of wings. The big nuke is from tawil pulling g ramona 3 cost which scales with the number of times you posse
24 has 4 different kits, one for each realm. Aqua, caro and ultra functions as dps for early game. Late game she works best as a chaos support
i think next is caro i believe

24 kit is based on what realm your team is.
Only way to get pure chaos realm is via 4 chaos awaker
24 is just 1 awaker

Horla more op than Pickman? His effects seems very powerful, but single turn, while Horla works all the time and slightly lesser?

If we're talking pickman oe then yes he win, 1k str + base damage + heal + weakness + vulnerability + str down + etc. Shit is broken 
Horla on the other hand cost much less (e0 / e1) and increase all your numbers
Pickman only downside is that he needs to play cards to work so he'll eat up arithmetica harmony which may or may not be a problem

"What is the best way to spend source liquid?"

Oh, the Silver? It's best spent on Limited Banners such as Single Target (for New Characters) and Triple Rerun (for Old Characters), it's generally not recommended to spend it on One In A Million as both the Character and their Weapon would share a Banner so its not likely that you'll obtain either the Character / Weapon of your choice

I'm pretty new to the game (like 10 days or so while spending most of the time reading and not playing) and trying to decide what to pull from one in a milliom event. Let's say I have resources to make 1 girl to Oe and I have all other chars from her comp (but not higher then e2, I'm not a whale after all). So, what's better in terms of general usage:
1) GDoll for GDoll, Karen, Xu, Thais
2) GMurphy for Gmurphy, Tulu, Thais, (something, let's say Murphy, Myriam or Goliath)
3) Kath for Kath, Ryker, Karen, (something but not GRamone cuz I don't have her and pulling Kath)
4) Gelot for Gelot, Helot, Thais, Horla
I'm not mentioning Tawil cuz I got 0 luck with Tawil/Hameln and since I'm missing both there is no reason to force it. Better to stick with something I can combine from what I've got
ok I’m gonna hold your horses for a moment, you do know how one in a million is structured right? instead of the 90 pity for an awakener its around 180 right?
I know, ofc I'll not try to pull oE, just 1-3, other copies from dupe items
ok then hmmmm
ah, also there is Salv around the corner, but I don't know stable teams for him and P-Dive leaderboard shows that he's not that good
same story with Castor
so they are excluded
GDoll or GMurphy
If it were me I'd go GDoll
